audit_summary.summary_text: The feature-flags skill implements a standard feature flag evaluation engine. The code reads from a local flags.json file, applies deterministic hash-based percentage rollouts, date gating, user allow/block lists, and attribute rules, then returns a boolean. All observed behavior is fully consistent with the stated purpose. No network requests, no environment variable access, no credential reads, no obfuscated logic, and no instruction overrides were found.
